description: Product Description Show off instantly whiter teeth* with clinically tested Colgate® Max White™ mouthwash. The proven alcohol free formula contains unique optic brighteners that reflect light, leaving teeth looking whiter straight away. Rinse twice a day for daily stain defence, fresh breath and cavity protection for your best smile. *Temporary optical effect of instant whitening. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitol, Tetrapotassium Pyrophosphate, Polysorbate 20, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Zinc Citrate, PVM/MA Copolymer, Aroma, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, CI 42051, Contains: Sodium Fluoride 0.05% (225ppm F¯) Directions For instantly whiter teeth and fresh breath, use this mouthwash between brushings. It also helps in cavity protection. Safety Warning 6 years and above Box Contains 1 x Colgate Maximum Mouth rinse White Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ.Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ.
